{{Quote|I told you I hung out with his son when I was a teen. You think a sector Governor would let just any riffraff do that?|[[Saberan Marcross]]|<ref name="Allegiance (novel)">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>}}
'''Crayg Choard''' was the son of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Barshnis Choard]].

==Biography==
As a teenager, he and his cousin [[Saberan Marcross]] would sneak around [[Makrin City]] at night and go to clubs and [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]]. For this purpose, Crayg showed Saberan how to access the governor's emergency exit from the palace.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
